# GitHub Copilot Instructions

- Read `AGENTS.md` and `.ai/status/CURRENT_STATE.md` before suggesting changes.
- Follow the relevant `.ai/contracts/*.md` files for the active task.
- Do not suggest tactical upload patches without harness coverage.
- Do not alter frozen mode/config paths unless the local harness proves a regression.
- Include validation commands and pass/fail conditions in any suggestion.
- No live Google Flow or Antigravity loop-debug advice.
